revision.text:
[[Category:Categories created from enwiki title]] [[Category:Tier 3 Categories]][[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[ja:Category:12世紀の仏教寺院]] [[ar:Category:معابد بوذية القرن 12]] [[es:Category:Templos budistas del siglo XII]] [[ur:Category:بارہویں صدی کے بدھ مندر]]
This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[Chion-in]].

revision.comment: Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q15306192)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories created from enwiki title]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text: <!--templates--> {{wikidata link|Q15306192}} <!--interwikis--> [[ja:Category:12世紀の仏教寺院]] [[ar:Category:معابد بوذية القرن 12]] [[es:Category:Templos budistas del siglo XII]] [[ur:Category:بارہویں صدی کے بدھ مندر]] <!--categories--> [[Category:Tier 3 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=12th-century_Buddhist_temples here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive.
